summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept independently for maintainer review; refs with unavailable live state are blocked on hydration and need a narrower re-run before any mutation.

actions.reason: Independent focused fix; no closure or merge allowed in plan shard.
